Words from my soul

Dear Siri

💌
My dearest Siri, I still remember the very first time I saw you in class on January 9th, 2023. I was just another guy sitting quietly, completely unaware that someone was about to change my entire world. You walked in and something shifted — like the universe quietly rearranged itself.

You made me laugh when I forgot how to. You made me open up when I had built walls. Before you, I was deep in my own shell — an introvert who barely spoke. But you somehow, effortlessly, pulled me out. I became someone I actually like because of you.

Your jokes. Your energy. The way you love Bisilu Kudureyondu. The way you eat chitranna like it's the best meal in the world. Your smile when you think nobody is watching. The fact that you're genuinely the most gorgeous person I've ever laid eyes on — inside and out.

And yes, even our fight — that unforgettable, messy, real fight — matters to me. Because it was real. You were real. And realness is something I never take for granted with you.

Our college became our place. Every corner of it holds a memory with you. Every hallway echo carries your laugh.

I don't have perfect words. I just know that you are my favourite person on this planet — my cutie pie, my cool girl, my amazing Siri. With everything I have, always — 💙
The most important question

Will You? 💍

Shanthala "Siri",
Will you be mine? 💙
From the first day in that classroom, to every laugh, every song, every fight and every memory — you have been the most beautiful chapter of my life. I don't want this chapter to end. I want to write every next page with you.

You changed me. You made me better. And I want to spend every day trying to be worthy of your smile.
